strategy: Team fight at 45,340 Health. Hit Myth, Life, or Death, each +30%, and never Balance, which he resists 67%.
Track every Krok Ankh he hangs, on Round 1 and every third Round. He revives to full if killed while any remain.
Clear Ankhs with the matching removal: Cleanse Charm for curses, Shatter for wards, Triage for damage-over-time. A damage spell will not strip them.
His revive heal is percentage-based, so infections and Doom cannot stop it. Removal is the only answer.
On the kill Round, have supports scrub all remaining Ankhs first, then the hitter fires a stacked Myth, Life, or Death hit.
cheatNotes: On Round 1, every third Round, and on late joins, he hangs a random Krok Ankh effect on himself or a Wizard.
Ankhs on himself are a Charm or a Ward. Remove them with charm or ward removal before you kill him.
Ankhs on a Wizard are a Curse, Jinx, or Damage over Time.
Krok Ankhs only come off with spells that specifically remove that effect type, so a damage spell will not clear the charm. Pack Cleanse Charm, Shatter, and Triage.
If Rama-Krok dies with any Krok Ankh still present, he fully revives. Clear every Ankh before the killing blow.
His revive heal is percentage-based, so infections and Doom cannot reduce it. Removal is the only answer.
